hero.title: Stop doing
hero.description: You ask AI for code with no process, no traceability, no review. The result? Fragile code, invisible tech debt, and zero leverage from the real potential of these tools.
hero.value: This is a complete AI-assisted development workflow — from feature conception to code review — with technical grounding on
workflow.title: The Workflow
workflow.subtitle: 7 skills that turn AI usage into a disciplined, reproducible process.
